'''H-3POA''' was a jade-colored [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that belonged to a group of protocol droids that was owned by [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. H-3POA was given to [[Vago Gejalli Thokka|Vago]], Popara's main assistant, to operate in negotiations and meetings. Vago could understand and speak both [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], but H-3POA in also used during other situations.

{{Droid-stub}}
